notes: Legacy-key reaper. Tiny boot-time IIFE (_phantom_legacyKeyReaper) clears two orphan localStorage keys from every production iPad: phantom_force_lead_v1 (dev-override flag, never read in prod) and gt_lessons (legacy GT cleanup target, never read). Both were previously only cleared by the dev escape hatch (5-tap-on-logo), so production caches accumulated them indefinitely. Idempotent: removeItem on a missing key is a no-op; safe to re-run every boot. Scope deliberately narrow: phantom_identity is still read as a legacy-fallback in _resolveIdentity (would need read->migrate->remove); phantom_rm_last is still actively used by renderRackMap; phantom_seen_boot is still written (read path is disabled but write is intentional) — all three NOT touched. Zero behavior change for users without legacy data. Builds on v1.6.49.
